# Acme — AI handoff landing (starter)

> Minimal marketing page built with ContinueWith starter-next.

## Product

Acme helps teams ship landing pages with an AI handoff widget so visitors can continue the page in ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.

## Pages

- / — marketing landing with ContinueWith widget

## Install widget

<script src="https://continuewith.ai/widget/v1.js" data-site-key="cw_demo_public_key" defer></script>

Replace `cw_demo_public_key` with your dashboard public site key.

## Links

- Website: https://example.com
- ContinueWith docs: https://continuewith.ai/docs/install
- AI Ready Index: https://ready.continuewith.ai
- Scan readiness: https://ready.continuewith.ai/scan

## Contact

Replace this file with your real product summary before launch.
